name: Denied comp after work fall in Saint George, sue employer?
description: Appeal comp; can't sue employer directly.

mainEntity.name: Denied comp after work fall in Saint George, sue employer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal comp; can't sue employer directly.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, comp exclusivity; exhaust appeals first.** Third-party only.[3] Key factors: ALJ hearing, then review. Federal OSHA rare. Intentional act exception. Lawyer wins 70% appeals.
